task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Role-Based Access Control** (Level 8)

Build an API with role-based access. Users have roles (admin/editor/viewer). POST /api/articles creates articles (editors and admins only). DELETE /api/articles/:id deletes (admins only). GET /api/articles lists all (anyone with auth). Viewers can read but not create or delete.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique
  password, required
  role, required

create a
final_source:
build for javascript backend

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique
  password, required
  role, required

create a Articles table:
  title, required
  body
  author_id

when user calls POST /api/register sending credentials:
  validate credentials:
    email is text, required
    password is text, required
    role is text, required
  saved_user = save credentials to Users
  send back saved_user with status 201

when user calls POST /api/login sending credentials:
  validate credentials:
    email is text, required
    password is text, required
  all_users = get all Users
  matching_user = first of all_users
  guard matching_user is not empty or 'Invalid credentials'
  send back { token is 'jwt_token_here', user_id is matching_user's id, role is matching_user's role } with status 200

when user calls POST /api/articles sending article:
  requires login
  guard caller's role is 'editor' or caller's role is 'admin' or 'Only editors and admins can create articles'
  article's author_id is caller's id
  saved = save article to Articles
  send back saved with status 201

when user calls DELETE /api/articles/:id:
  requires login
  guard caller's role is 'admin' or 'Only admins can delete articles'
  delete from Articles with this id
  send back 'ok' with status 200

when user calls GET /api/articles:
  requires login
  articles = get all Articles
  send back articles with status 200
